name: @stint/cli
description: tt — the Stint command-line surface. Full parity with the GUI over the same @stint/core database.
comment:launcher: Canonical CLI entrypoint, relative to this package, that the single-installer tt shim targets inside the bundled app (PRD §19 R02). packaging/tt-launcher.sh resolves <app>/Contents/Resources/app/packages/cli/dist/bin.js (macOS) or <opt>/resources/app/packages/cli/dist/bin.js (Linux) — keep CLI_REL in that shim in sync with the bin mapping above.
